mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POST_COMMENT ( comment_id, post_id, member_id, content, parent_comment_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( seq_post_comment.NEXTVAL, #{post_id}, #{member_id}, #{content}, #{parent_comment_id}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT pc.comment_id, pc.post_id, pc.member_id, pc.content, pc.parent_comment_id, pc.created_at, pc.updated_at, pc.like_count, pc.report_count, m.nickname, m.profile_image_url FROM POST_COMMENT pc LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON pc.member_id = m.member_id WHERE pc.post_id = #{post_id} and pc.is_visible = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(pc.parent_comment_id, pc.comment_id), pc.created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE POST_COMMENT SET IS_VISIBLE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE parent_comment_id = #{comment_id}
UPDATE POST_COMMENT SET IS_VISIBLE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE comment_id = #{comment_id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from POST_COMMENT where member_id = #{member_id} and is_visible = 'Y'
